tool_use.name: Edit
tool_use.param: 4. [ ] **Only for 5-file gateways:** Implement in `dry_run.py`: - Read-only methods: de...[truncated 149 chars]...lently - Mutation methods: print, then delegate 6. [ ] Add unit tests for Fake behavior
4. [ ] **Only for 4-file gateways:** Implement in `dry_run.py`: - Read-only methods: delegate to wrapped - Mutation methods: no-op, return success value 5. [ ] Add unit tests for Fake behavior

session.assistant: First, let me get the exact set of files that still reference printing/5-file patterns so I know exactly what to update:
session.tool_result:
docs/learned/testing/monkeypatch-elimination-checklist.md:45:If the operation doesn't map to an existing gateway, create one before migrating tests. See [Gateway ABC Implementation](../architecture/gateway-abc-implementation.md) for the 5-file (or 3-file simplified) pattern. docs/learned/testing/frozen-dataclass-test-doubles.md:88:- [Gateway ABC Implementation Checklist](../architecture/gateway-abc-implementation.md) — the 5-file pattern that fakes implement, including the fake mutation tracking checklist docs/learned/testing/gateway-fake-testing-exemplar.md:89:- [Gateway ABC Implementation Checklist](../architecture/gateway-abc-implementation.md) — The 5-place implementation pattern that fakes are part of docs/learned/cli/error-handling-antipatterns.md:156:- ~5 files still contain RuntimeError instances (some legitimate, some anti-patterns) docs/learned/cli/incomplete-command-removal.md:47:- [Gateway ABC Implementation Checklist](../architecture/gateway-abc-implementation.md) — 5-place pattern (similar multi-location removal concern) docs/learned/cli/output-styling.md:282:Example: `erk docs sync` processes ~55 files but reports only 6 milestones (one per pipeline stage). docs/learned/uncategorized/tripwires.md:19:**adding a new method to Git/GitHub/Graphite ABC** → Read [Universal Tripwires](universal-tripwires.md) first. Must implement in 5 places: abc.py, real.py, fake.py, dry_run.py, printing.py. docs/learned/planning/gateway-consolidation-checklist.md:25:2. **Consistency enforcement** — the 5-file pattern (abc/real/fake/dry_run/printing) is easier to verify when all gateways are siblings docs/learned/planning/gateway-consolidation-checklist.md:28:There are currently 27 gateway packages in this directory. Some use the full 5-file pattern, others use a simplified 3-file pattern (no dry_run/printing). Complex domains (Git, GitHub, Graphite) use nested sub-gateways. docs/learned/planning/gateway-consolidation-checklist.md:86:- [Gateway ABC Implementation Checklist](../architecture/gateway-abc-implementation.md) — the 5-place implementation pattern that consolidated gateways must follow docs/learned/gateway/codespace-gateway.md:21:The codespace gateway uses a **3-place pattern** (ABC, real, fake) instead of the standard 5-place gateway pattern. This document explains when to omit dry-run and printing implementations — a decision that generalizes to any gateway wrapping process-replacing or inherently remote operations. docs/learned/gateway/codespace-gateway.md:27:| Characteristic | 5-place (standard) | 3-place (codespace, agent_launcher) | docs/learned/gateway/codespace-gateway.md:80:- [Gateway ABC Implementation](../architecture/gateway-abc-implementation.md) — 5-place pattern, 3-place variant decision criteria docs/learned/universal-tripwires.md:12: warning: "Must implement in 5 places: abc.py, real.py, fake.py, dry_run.py, printing.py." docs/learned/universal-tripwires.md:44:- [Gateway ABC Implementation Checklist](architecture/gateway-abc-implementation.md) - 5-place implementation pattern docs/learned/refactoring/tripwires.md:31:**renaming a command or concept across the codebase** → Read [Coordinated Cross-Codebase Rename Pattern](coordinated-rename.md) first. Follow the 12-point checklist in coordinated-rename.md. Renames typically touch 13-15 files across CLI/TUI/tests/docs/skills. Missing any site causes runtime errors or stale references. docs/learned/refactoring/coordinated-rename.md:9: warning: "Follow the 12-point checklist in coordinated-rename.md. Renames typically touch 13-15 files across CLI/TUI/tests/docs/skills. Missing any site causes runtime errors or stale references." docs/learned/refactoring/libcst-systematic-imports.md:380:- [Gateway ABC Implementation Checklist](../architecture/gateway-abc-implementation.md) — the 5-place pattern that must be updated during consolidation docs/learned/architecture/gateway-removal-pattern.md:113:**Why 5-place removal:** Partial removal causes type checker errors. If the ABC still declares the property but Real doesn't implement it, `ty` reports an unimplemented abstract method. All layers must change atomically. docs/learned/architecture/gateway-removal-pattern.md:141:3. **Layer deletion** — Removed `src/erk/gateway/claude_executor/` containing abc.py, real.py, fake.py, dry_run.py, printing.py docs/learned/architecture/gateway-specific-patterns.md:115:- [Gateway ABC Implementation](gateway-abc-implementation.md) - 5-place implementation checklist docs/learned/architecture/tripwires.md:47:**adding a new method to Git ABC** → Read [Gateway ABC Implementation Checklist](gateway-abc-implementation.md) first. Must implement in 5 places: abc.py, real.py, fake.py, dry_run.py, printing.py. docs/learned/architecture/tripwires.md:49:**adding a new method to Graphite ABC** → Read [Gateway ABC Implementation Checklist](gateway-abc-implementation.md) first. Must implement in 5 places: abc.py, real.py, fake.py, dry_run.py, printing.py. docs/learned/architecture/tripwires.md:53:**adding a new method to LocalGitHub ABC** → Read [Gateway ABC Implementation Checklist](gateway-abc-implementation.md) first. Must implement in 5 places: abc.py, real.py, fake.py, dry_run.py, printing.py. docs/learned/architecture/tripwires.md:61:**adding a subgateway property to a gateway ABC** → Read [Flatten Subgateway Pattern](flatten-subgateway-pattern.md) first. Must implement property in 5 places: ABC with TYPE_CHECKING import guard, Real with concrete instance, Fake with linked state, DryRun wrapping inner subgateway, Printing wrapping with script_mode/dry_run. docs/learned/architecture/tripwires.md:143:**changing gateway return type to discriminated union** → Read [Gateway ABC Implementation Checklist](gateway-abc-implementation.md) first. Verify all 5 implementations import the new types. Missing imports in abc.py, fake.py, dry_run.py, or printing.py break the gateway pattern. docs/learned/architecture/tripwires.md:175:**creating a new ABC without deciding gateway vs backend pattern** → Read [Gateway vs Backend ABC Pattern](gateway-vs-backend.md) first. Read gateway-vs-backend.md first. Gateways wrap external tools (5-place: abc, real, fake, dry_run, printing). Backends abstract business logic (3-place: abc, real, fake). Wrong choice creates unnecessary boilerplate or missing test support. docs/learned/architecture/tripwires.md:279:**removing an abstract method from a gateway ABC** → Read [Gateway ABC Implementation Checklist](gateway-abc-implementation.md) first. Must remove from 5 places simultaneously: abc.py, real.py, fake.py, dry_run.py, printing.py. Partial removal causes type checker errors. Update all call sites to use subgateway property. Verify with grep across packages. docs/learned/architecture/discriminated-union-error-handling.md:419:- [Gateway ABC Implementation](gateway-abc-implementation.md) - 5-place implementation pattern for gateway methods docs/learned/architecture/fake-mutation-tracking.md:65:- [Gateway ABC Implementation](gateway-abc-implementation.md) - Full 5-place pattern
... [46 lines omitted] ...
docs/learned/architecture/gateway-vs-backend.md:10: warning: "Read gateway-vs-backend.md first. Gateways wrap external tools (5-place: abc, real, fake, dry_run, printing). Backends abstract business logic (3-place: abc, real, fake). Wrong choice creates unnecessary boilerplate or missing test support." docs/learned/architecture/flatten-subgateway-pattern.md:12: warning: "Must implement property in 5 places: ABC with TYPE_CHECKING import guard, Real with concrete instance, Fake with linked state, DryRun wrapping inner subgateway, Printing wrapping with script_mode/dry_run." docs/learned/architecture/gateway-error-boundaries.md:13: context: "The 5-file gateway pattern has clear error boundary responsibilities. Real implementations catch and convert subprocess/system errors. Fakes simulate errors via constructor params. Dry-run always returns success." docs/learned/architecture/gateway-error-boundaries.md:21:In erk's 5-file gateway pattern, **only real.py catches exceptions**. The other four files (abc.py, fake.py, dry_run.py, printing.py) never use try/except — they express failure through different mechanisms. docs/learned/architecture/gateway-error-boundaries.md:102:| `printing.py` | Delegates to wrapped implementation (pass-through) | No | docs/learned/architecture/gateway-error-boundaries.md:139:### printing.py: Transparent Wrapper docs/learned/architecture/gateway-error-boundaries.md:202:- [Gateway ABC Implementation](gateway-abc-implementation.md) - 5-file checklist covering abc.py, real.py, fake.py, dry_run.py, printing.py docs/learned/architecture/git-operation-patterns.md:148:- [Gateway Error Boundaries](gateway-error-boundaries.md) — Where try/except belongs in the 5-file gateway pattern

.claude/commands/erk/learn.md:614:| New gateway method | Add tripwire about ABC implementation (5 places to update) | .claude/commands/local/tdd.md:40: - If YES: You must follow the gateway checklist (5-file implementation) .claude/commands/local/tdd.md:146:5. **Printing** (`src/erk_shared/<gateway>/printing.py`): Implement printing wrapper .claude/agents/changelog/commit-categorizer.md:187:- Gateway ABC method additions (`abc.py`, `real.py`, `fake.py`, `dry_run.py`, `printing.py`) -> internal .claude/agents/learn/code-diff-analyzer.md:91:| ... | ... | Tripwire (5 places) | .claude/agents/learn/documentation-gap-identifier.md:163:| HIGH | Gateway methods (require 5-place updates), contradictions to resolve, external API quirks | .claude/agents/learn/documentation-gap-identifier.md:219:| 4 | Gateway.method() | gateway | TRIPWIRE | tripwires.md | Must update 5 places | .claude/skills/rename-swarm/SKILL.md:19:- **Fewer than 5 files** — sequential edits are simpler and have less overhead .claude/skills/refac-mock-to-fake/SKILL.md:168:If no suitable fake exists, create one following the 5-place gateway pattern.
